name: Mikita
alt_names: Miss Valentine (ミス・バレンタイン)
description:
__Height:__ 177 cm (5'10")
__Affiliation:__ Baroque Works
__Devil Fruit:__  ~!Kiro Kiro no Mi (Kilo-Kilo Fruit)!~
__Devil Fruit Type:__ ~!Paramecia!~
__Bounty:__ ~!7,500,000!~

She is an officer agent for the Baroque Works who was partnered with Mr. 5, and she has the power of the Kilo Kilo Fruit, which allows her to change her weight to anything between 1 and 10,000 kilograms. She uses this power to crush her opponents or to make her light enough to glide through the air using her umbrella.
